decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id (corridor_first-second-avenues-brt) is the closest match: same borough (Manhattan), same streets (First Avenue and Second Avenue), same overall corridor limits (South Ferry to 125th Street per source blocks p006_c0006 and p011_c0010). The source 2010_06_09_brt_1st2nd_cb11 is already in that record's source_ids. The observation's 'Houston Street to 125th Street' limits reflect the bus lane implementation zone (p020_c0005), not a different corridor. Since the closest matching registry record is the observation's own base_record_id, decision is new per identity-packet rules.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 8.5 miles from South Ferry to 125 th Street
Offset or curbside bus lanes from Houston St to 125 St on both Avenues
